title: Generate + verify full core set (4 families, both paper sizes, colour+grayscale)
context: Once the parametric generator and verification harness are built and all four core generators are complete (fractions, counters, number lines, base-ten blocks), this task generates the complete verified core set using the automated pipeline. It replaces the manual cold-start approach with a fully automated, CI-gated, educator-reviewed release. Every family must pass automated verification, a physical print test, and accessibility checks before it can be distributed.
objective: Use the parametric generator engine to produce the complete core set (all four families, both paper sizes, colour+grayscale), pass all automated and physical verification gates, and distribute via the confirmed channel.
acceptanceCriteria: All four families (fraction tiles, counters, number lines, base-ten blocks) generated by the automated engine for A4 and US Letter in colour and grayscale.
Every generated PDF passes the automated dimensional and relationship verification harness with a clean report.
Physical print tests completed for all four families on A4 and US Letter printers; test records (date, printer model, measurements) attached.
Accessibility checks pass for all outputs: WCAG AA contrast, no colour-only encoding, open-licensed embedded font.
All four families distributed through at least one confirmed channel; zero license violations.
Math-educator review sign-off recorded for all four families.
output: The complete core PDF set in output/core-set/ (4 families x 2 paper sizes x 2 colour modes = 16+ PDFs), with automated verification reports and physical print-test records, in a pull request, CC-BY-4.0.
